untranslatable_reason: Handle pattern definition requires identifying a specific 54 or 58-day consolidation phase and evaluating breakout position relative to 12-month highs/lows. This requires multi-timeframe analysis and pattern shape detection (cup-with-handle topology) which cannot be expressed with single-bar indicator conditions. The pattern depends on identifying a prior cup structure and measuring handle duration/amplitude, which exceeds the scope of available point-in-time indicators.
